description: OLDEST AND BEST ADVERTISING MEDIUM IN GRAND RAPIDS AND vicinity A L FONTAINE Publisher HEY CONCRETE COMPANY HIGHLY PRAISED W H Carey of the Carey Concrete Company is back from Chicago where lie attended the National Cement Pro ducts Association at the Coliseum from Feb 16th to 23rd His company had manufactured a cement railing which was used in front and along the sides of the booth in which Za gelmeyer Cast Stone Block Machin ery Cos had their display In addi tion to this railing Mr Carey took a long some polished concrete granite slabs for exhibition These slabs and railing attracted considerable attention which the following two letters will indicate which Mr Carey has received since the exhibit Bay City Michigan March Bth 1911 Mr W H Carey Grand Rapids Wis Dear SirWe beg to acknow ledge receipt of your favor of the 4th inst enclosing result of the crushing test of small piece of pol ished concrete slab shown in the ex hibit you made up for us at the Chi cago Cement Show To say that the enormous crushing strain your granite concrete stands surprises us is drawing it mild It stood a strain of nearly
